landing.subtitle: Cognitive Assessment Platform
landing.valueLead: A research-driven platform designed to measure and visualize higher-order cognitive capacities involved in geometry learning, with the aim of detecting cognitive deficiencies through appropriate numerical models within longitudinal academic studies.
landing.researchIntro: This platform is part of academic research that aims to:
landing.researchBullet2: identify deficiencies in higher-order cognitive capacities;
landing.researchBullet3: use numerical models for longitudinal analysis.
landing.signInHint: Select your role and use any demo credentials to explore the platform.
landing.demoHint: Register first, then sign in. Demo data is stored under /data on the server.
landing.footerBlurb: Built within the ENS FES academic context to support PhD-level research in mathematical cognition.
